Frequently Asked Questions
Q1. When did the Delhi High Court HJS Online Application Process Start?
The online application process started on 01 July 2026 .
Q2. What is the Exam Date for Delhi High Court HJS 2026?
The Examination will be conducted in 26/07/2026 .
Q3. Where can I find the syllabus for the Delhi High Court HJS 2026 Examination?
The detailed syllabus and examination scheme are available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to read the notification carefully for complete details.
Q4. How can I download the Delhi High Court Higher Judicial Service HJS 2026 Notification PDF?
Candidates can download the notification through SarkariResult.com.
Q5. What is the last date to apply online for Delhi HJS 2026 Online Form?
The last date to apply online is 15 July  2026..
Q6. What is the last date to pay the application fee?
Candidates can pay the application fee up to 15 July 2026 .
Q7. How can I apply for Delhi High Court HJS Online Form 2026?
Delhi High Court Higher Judicial Service HJS Online Form 2026 Sarkari Result .
tables: Delhi Higher Judicial Services HJS Recruitment 2026 Admit Card

High Court of Delhi, New Delhi has released Delhi High Court Higher Judicial Service Exam 2026 Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this Delhi High Court HJS 2026 Exam can Apply Online from 01/07/2026 to 15/07/2026. Read the notification for Delhi HC HJS Exam, eligibility, Document Required, age limit, How to Apply and all other information.
